evals.prompt: Upgrade my ID Capture integration to the latest SDK (v8). It stopped compiling. Here's my screen file: before-v7-idcapture.tsx and package_v7.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill migrates the v7 scanner assignment (settings.scannerType = new FullDocumentScanner()) to the v8 wrapped form (settings.scanner = new IdCaptureScanner(new FullDocumentScanner())), replaces the removed AamvaBarcodeVerifier with settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes + reading verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification, bumps package.json to 8.x, and adds the AAMVA add-on package. Listener and lifecycle are preserved.

assertions.text: settings.scannerType is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)
verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification is read instead of calling a verifier (semantic)
AamvaBarcodeVerifier is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)
AamvaBarcodeVerifier.create is not called in the final migrated code, though it may appear in before/after explanation prose (semantic)
package.json is bumped to an 8.x version for the scandit-react-native-datacapture-* packages (semantic)
the existing didCaptureId and didRejectId callbacks are preserved (semantic)

evals.prompt: Just fix the scanner API in this file for the v8 upgrade — I'll deal with the rest later. Here's before-v7-idcapture.tsx.
evals.expected_output: The skill changes settings.scannerType = new FullDocumentScanner() into settings.scanner = new IdCaptureScanner(new FullDocumentScanner()).

assertions.text: settings.scannerType is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)

evals.prompt: After upgrading to v8 I also want to reject expired documents and anyone under 18, using the new declarative settings rather than checking manually. Here's before-v7-idcapture.tsx.
evals.expected_output: The skill completes the v8 scanner/verifier migration and additionally sets settings.rejectExpiredIds = true and settings.rejectHolderBelowAge = 18, noting these surface DocumentExpired and HolderUnderage in didRejectId.

assertions.text: these flags are described as surfacing reasons in didRejectId, e.g. DocumentExpired and HolderUnderage (semantic)
settings.scannerType is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)
